# gameboycss (vendored fork)

Console shell components adapted from [ManzDev/gameboycss](https://github.com/ManzDev/gameboycss) (ISC License).

Original author: ManzDev (@Manz)

Changes in this fork:
- D-pad and A/B buttons dispatch input events
- Screen replaced with GameDudeSynth menu (`game-dude-menu-screen`)
- Terminator 2 demo assets not included
- Lit 3 + esbuild instead of Parcel
